title: Reflexive verbs in depth
objectives: Use reflexive verbs across all persons and tenses
grammar_notes: Reflexive pronouns always match the subject: me, te, se, nos, os, se.
Reciprocal use: 'nos vemos' (we see each other), 'se aman' (they love each other) — plural subject required.
Some verbs CHANGE meaning when reflexive: ir (go somewhere) vs irse (leave). dormir (sleep) vs dormirse (fall asleep). poner (put) vs ponerse (put on / become).
Russian -ся/-сь covers most of these (жениться, развестись, остаться).
example_phrases: Mis padres se conocieron en la universidad.
Me pongo nerviosa cuando hablo en público.
